corrections.note: Printed body reads ἀνταπόδοσιν, not ἀνταπόδομα.
Accent in print is on ω.
Apparatus form is correctly read but accents are missing in transcription.

corrections.current: εν δυναμει δυναμιν ℵ* -μ̣ι ℵc.a. -μει V
corrections.correct: ἐκ δυνάμει δύναμιν ℵ* -μ̣ι ℵc.a. -μει V
corrections.note: Apparatus begins ἐκ, not ἐν, matching the body lemma context.
The siglum is ℵ, not V.

corrections.current: τον λαον αυτ.] om λαον V (hab ℵV)
corrections.correct: τὸν λαὸν αὐτ.] om λαον A (hab ℵV)
corrections.note: The omitted witness is A, not V; parenthetical hab ℵV is correct.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct; one substantive body error at II 68. Apparatus has a few witness/siglum misreadings and one reading miscopied at II 66.
